description_long: This object is a soft, brown fabric sack with a rounded, bulbous base and a wide, open mouth. The top edge is loosely gathered and stitched with visible, thick thread, giving it a rustic, hand-sewn appearance. The fabric has a subtle diagonal weave texture, and the stitching is prominent along one side, suggesting a seam. The opening reveals a glimpse of gold-colored contents inside, possibly coins or other valuables. A simple cord loop is attached near the top, likely for tying or carrying. The overall look is reminiscent of a money bag or pouch commonly seen in urban or historical settings.
description: A brown, fabric sack with visible stitching, a wide open mouth, and a glimpse of gold contents inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open mouth, gold contents, and a cord loop hanging from the top edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded shape and the open top with visible gold inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the prominent stitched seam running vertically down the sack.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the open mouth and subtle fabric texture, no cord loop visible.
